steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content:
The given speed is $17.700$ miles per hour, and we need to convert to yards per hour. The conversion factor is $1 \text{ mile} = 1,760 \text{ yards}$.

To convert, multiply the speed by the conversion factor: $17.700 \times 1,760$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content:
$$17.700 \times 1,760 = 31,152$$
The average speed during the cycling leg is 31,152 yards per hour.
